title: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Konoike Construction Company Limited) (Rehabilitation of TANZAM Highway) Order, 2003
title_en: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Konoike Construction Company Limited) (Rehabilitation of TANZAM Highway) Order, 2003

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Konoike Construction Company Limited) (Rehabilitation of TANZAM Highway) Order, 2003 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the First day of May, 2003.

This order is issued pursuant to Exchange Notes signed on the 14 th day of May, 2002 between the Government of Japan and the Government of the United Republic of Tanzania concerning the project for rehabilitation of TANZAM Highway (Kitonga Gorge).

Subject to the conditions specified in paragraph 4 of this Order, the whole of the excise duty payable on the fuel specified on the schedule to this order, imported or purchased prior to clearance through customs by or on behalf of Konoike Construction Company Limited to be used solely in the implementation of rehabilitation of TANZAM highway (Kitonga Gorge) project and as shall be closely monitored by the Tanzania Revenue Authority is hereby exempted.

The exemption granted under this Order shall cease to have effect and the excise duty, so exempted shall become due and be payable as if this Order had not been made if the said fuel is used for other purposes or is transferred, sold or disposed of in any way to another person not entitled to enjoy similar privileges as are conferred under this Order. Schedule No. Description Quantify 1. Diesel Oil 2,000,000 Litres 2.
